name: Team Fortress 2- A whole new person (homelessnes)
description: So basically this was REQUESTED by @Gasman (check out their own bots they're amazing). So you're homeless. After the Team disbanded you didn't have a place to stay, so you're pretty much on the streets. But you were practically the most bloodthirsty merc out there. Anyway this is a continuation of my last bot "({~•Team Fortress 2•~}): A whole new person", where instead of homeless, you're actually peacefull.
creator: R1X0T1N3
